issue_title: 🐛 [BUG] - SheetProvider context breaks on dynamic mounting
issue_body_preview:
### Description

I have provided a minimum React example in the reproduction steps, with two GridSheets, one only showing after a button is pressed. Note that Sheet 1 cannot reference anything from Sheet 2, but Sheet 2 can reference cells in Sheet 1 just fine.

It seems that the context isn't update
test_description_zh: 在页面中放置两个 GridSheet 实例，其中第二个 GridSheet 通过按钮点击后动态挂载。第一个 GridSheet 中的单元格公式引用第二个 GridSheet 中的单元格值，观察动态挂载第二个 GridSheet 后，第一个 GridSheet 是否能正确解析并显示跨表引用的数据。
expected_result_zh: 当第二个 GridSheet 通过按钮动态挂载后，SheetProvider 上下文应正确更新，第一个 GridSheet 中引用第二个 GridSheet 单元格的公式能够正确计算并显示对应的值，两个表格之间的跨表引用在双向上均能正常工作。
